title: Motorcyclist Fatally Injured in Independence Boulevard Crash
summary: A motorcyclist died after a crash on East Independence Boulevard near Sardis Road on March 26.
charlotte_impact: Highlights traffic safety concerns and the potential dangers faced by motorcyclists on busy roads.

title: Mother Charged After Infant Falls from Vehicle, Suffers Brain Injury
summary: A Charlotte mother is charged with felony child abuse after her 7-month-old fell from a moving vehicle, sustaining a serious head injury.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious questions about child safety and parental responsibility, with potential legal and social repercussions.

title: Warmer Weather Expected for End of March and Start of April
summary: A mid-week heat wave will bring unseasonably warm temperatures, peaking at 84, with possible showers and storms.
charlotte_impact: Provides information about upcoming weather conditions, allowing residents to prepare for temperature changes and potential storms.

title: Study Links Mentally Active Sitting to Lower Dementia Risk
summary: A study suggests that mentally engaging activities while sitting can reduce dementia risk, while passive activities may increase it.
charlotte_impact: Offers insights into maintaining cognitive health and reducing the risk of dementia through simple lifestyle adjustments.
